requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Testing for Lithium Cells and Batteries
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电芯和电池的UN 38.3运输测试
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電芯和電池的UN 38.3運輸測試

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Peru by air, sea, or land are subject to the UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods and IATA/IMDG/ADR dangerous goods regulations as applicable. UN 38.3 transport testing (vibration, shock, thermal cycling, altitude simulation, crush, overcharge, forced discharge) is required for all lithium cells and batteries before transport. This requirement applies regardless of whether the BESS is a complete system or battery component shipment. Peruvian customs and transport authorities apply international dangerous goods rules.
summary.zh: 通过航空、海运或陆运运往秘鲁的锂电芯和电池须遵守《联合国危险货物运输建议书》以及适用的IATA/IMDG/ADR危险货物法规。所有锂电芯和电池在运输前均须进行UN 38.3运输测试（振动、冲击、热循环、高度模拟、挤压、过充、强制放电）。无论BESS是作为完整系统还是电池部件出运，该要求均适用。秘鲁海关和运输主管机构执行国际危险货物规则。
summary.zht: 通過航空、海運或陸運運往秘魯的鋰電芯和電池須遵守《聯合國危險貨物運輸建議書》以及適用的IATA/IMDG/ADR危險貨物法規。所有鋰電芯和電池在運輸前均須進行UN 38.3運輸測試（振動、衝擊、熱循環、高度模擬、擠壓、過充、強制放電）。無論BESS是作為完整系統還是電池部件出運，該要求均適用。秘魯海關和運輸主管機構執行國際危險貨物規則。

standards_or_laws: UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3)
Peruvian customs dangerous goods classification requirements

summary.en: Chinese lithium battery manufacturers obtain UN 38.3 test reports for export shipments. These UN 38.3 reports are internationally recognized and are valid for Peru import purposes if the tested cells and battery configuration match the shipped goods. The UN 38.3 report should reference the specific cell type, capacity, chemistry, and battery configuration.
summary.zh: 中国锂电池制造商为出口货物获取UN 38.3测试报告。这些UN 38.3报告获国际认可，如测试的电芯和电池配置与所发货物一致，则对秘鲁进口有效。UN 38.3报告应注明具体电芯类型、容量、化学体系和电池配置。
summary.zht: 中國鋰電池製造商為出口貨物獲取UN 38.3測試報告。這些UN 38.3報告獲國際認可，如測試的電芯和電池配置與所發貨物一致，則對秘魯進口有效。UN 38.3報告應注明具體電芯類型、容量、化學體系和電池配置。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports (held by Chinese manufacturers for export)

gap.en: Confirm that the UN 38.3 test report covers the specific cell type, capacity, chemistry (e.g., LFP, NMC), and module/battery-pack configuration being exported. A report for a different cell size or configuration is not valid. Prepare shipping documents (transport classification, SDS, UN number, packing instructions) for Peru customs.
gap.zh: 确认UN 38.3测试报告涵盖所出口的具体电芯类型、容量、化学体系（如磷酸铁锂、三元）和模组/电池包配置。针对不同电芯规格或配置的报告无效。准备秘鲁海关所需的运输文件（运输分类、安全数据表、UN编号、包装说明）。
gap.zht: 確認UN 38.3測試報告涵蓋所出口的具體電芯類型、容量、化學體系（如磷酸鐵鋰、三元）和模組/電池包配置。針對不同電芯規格或配置的報告無效。準備秘魯海關所需的運輸文件（運輸分類、安全數據表、UN編號、包裝說明）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all lithium battery shipments under international dangerous goods transport regulations; enforced at Peru customs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese export shipments; Chinese manufacturers routinely hold UN 38.3 reports

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm the UN 38.3 test report covers the exact cell and battery configuration being exported to Peru. Prepare Peru-bound shipping documents for lithium dangerous goods. A generic or mismatched UN 38.3 report will not satisfy customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 确认UN 38.3测试报告涵盖向秘鲁出口的具体电芯和电池配置。准备秘鲁目的地的锂电危险品运输文件。通用或不匹配的UN 38.3报告将无法满足海关要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 確認UN 38.3測試報告涵蓋向秘魯出口的具體電芯和電池配置。準備秘魯目的地的鋰電危險品運輸文件。通用或不匹配的UN 38.3報告將無法滿足海關要求。
